title: Move Featured Collections section above About section on Home page

requirements.summary: Reorder Home page sections to display FeaturedCollections before AboutSection
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the Home page shows the Featured Collections grid before the About Luxyle section when scrolling down.
All other sections remain in their previous relative order (CollectionGallery, Reviews, FeedbackForm, AppointmentBooking follow After About).
No visual regressions are introduced in any of the affected sections.

file_operations.description: Reorder the section components in the HomePage component so that FeaturedCollections appears before AboutSection. The new order should be: HeroSection, stats bar, FeaturedCollections, AboutSection, CollectionGallery, ReviewsSection, FeedbackForm, AppointmentBooking. This is a simple reordering of JSX elements with no changes to props or component logic.
